templates.notes: Article-style report starter using standard LaTeX article class.
ACM acmart starter. For named ACM venues, check latest official template before use.
CVPR-style starter plus local style files. For named CVPR submissions, check latest official author kit before use.
Elsevier elsarticle starter. Check target journal guide before submission.
Offline KOMA-Script professional report starter. Use for generic/internal reports without venue constraints.
ICLR-style starter plus local style files. For named ICLR submissions, check latest official author kit before use.
IEEEtran starter. For named IEEE venues, check latest official template before use.
Springer LNCS llncs starter. For proceedings, check latest official template before use.
Springer Nature article-structured starter. For journal submissions, check latest official sn-jnl template before use.
Long report starter using KOMA-Script. Use official university template when required.
